The '''''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought''', also known as an '''Ugor battle-wagon''', was a heavily armed and armored [[Ugor/Legends|Ugor]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]] capable of aggressive scavenging operations in space.

==Characteristics==
The saucer-shaped vessel was 150 meters in diameter, and was flown by a crew of 48. Its antiquated weapons included auto-[[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[pseudosonic beamer]]s, [[G-type rotolaser]]s and missile weapons similar to [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]]. An array of [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beams]] drew space refuse into a central hole.

==History==
Ugor ''Black Hole''s were known to appear to gather the refuse behind [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] starships that had jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

{{Ship-stub}}
